ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.SBQQ__Status__c) = 'Pending Approval', OR(BEGINS(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_Units'), BEGINS(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_BluEdge')), TEXT($User.UserType) <> 'Standard', OR(AND(ISCHANGED(StageName), TEXT(StageName) <> 'Quoting'), ISCHANGED(Name), ISCHANGED(CloseDate), ISCHANGED(NATT_Opportunity_Percentage__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Customer_Category__c), ISCHANGED(Description), ISCHANGED(LeadSource), ISCHANGED(NATT_Other_Lost_Reason__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The primary quote was already submitted for approval. If you need to edit it, contact your admin.
